title: A Strayed Herd
intro: A herd of Elysian ponies — manes like banked coals, eyes too knowing — drifts down from the high passes and lingers in Runehold's lower meadow. They are no one's, for now.

advisors.text: Meat and hides through Deepfrost, Archon. The meadow will not feed us; they might.
Ride them! Tame one and you have a friend out of the Elysian Fields. Eat one and you have a sad winter dinner.

choices.label: Take the herd for meat and hide

win.text: The meadow runs red and the granary fills. The coven eats; something old in the high passes takes note.

choices.label: Try to gentle and keep the herd

win.text: Patient hands and quiet runes win them over. Runehold has mounts now, and a little wonder it had forgotten.

lose.text: The herd will not be held. By morning they are gone over the ridge, and you are left with trampled fields.
